case_title: VIRA KRAVSTOVA VS. IAN BIRCHALL AND ASSOCIATES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 16348062)

WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRAVSTOVA, VIRA AS TO DEFENDANT IAN BIRCHALL AND ASSOCIATES DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-21-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-28-2016

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16206070), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRAVSTOVA, VIRA SERVED JUL-25-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT IAN BIRCHALL AND ASSOCIATES
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-21-2016 CONTINUED TO FEB-01-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-01-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
